title: ambrosia scabra
intro: Ambrosia scabra, also known as sand-bur or sand-bur marigold, is a perennial herb in the Asteraceae family native to the Great Plains region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ambrosia scabra include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Ambrosia scabra include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil.
